clipId.description: Stable clip identifier used to join gold, silver, runtime, and teacher records.

sourceDomain.description: Origin of the clip, such as live staging, human review, teacher-generated audit, or imported dataset.

eventFamily.description: Unified family label shared by gold and silver annotations.

outcome.description: Outcome-level label used for basketball-specific supervision.

shotSubtype.description: Shot subtype when the clip is a shot attempt; otherwise null.

ballVisible.description: Whether the ball is visible anywhere in the clip window.

hoopVisible.description: Whether the rim/hoop is visible anywhere in the clip window.

ballNearRim.description: Normalized strength that the ball was near the rim.

ballThroughHoopLikelihood.description: Normalized likelihood that the ball passed through the hoop.

possessionChangeLikelihood.description: Normalized likelihood of a possession change in the clip.

transitionLikelihood.description: Normalized likelihood that the clip is part of transition play.

teacherConfidence.description: Confidence reported by the offline teacher labeler, if present.

humanVerified.description: True only when a human has verified the annotation.

reviewerNotes.description: Short review notes explaining disagreements, ambiguity, or fixes.

rawRuntimeOutputs.description: Opaque runtime outputs captured before any gold/silver reconciliation.

rawTeacherOutputs.description: Opaque offline teacher outputs captured separately from runtime outputs.
